name: Lead generation system: find businesses, scrape emails, qualify leads
description: Uses Exa to find businesses by type and location, Firecrawl to scrape their websites for contact information, Claude AI to extract and qualify leads with grades, and saves qualified leads to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Lead generation system: Google Maps to email scraper with Google Sheets export

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for business search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for website scraping

businessType.description: Type of business to search for (e.g. 'dentists', 'restaurants', 'plumbers')

location.description: City or area to search (e.g. 'Calgary, AB', 'Austin, TX')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of businesses to scrape (1-20)

steps.name: Scrape business websites for contact info
Compile all scraped data for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for lead extraction and qualification
Run Claude AI to extract and qualify leads
Build Google Sheets data from leads
